title: DivyaVastra – Gopi Skirts Ladies Clothing Storefront

requirements.text: Create a homepage for DivyaVastra that displays the brand name prominently, a tagline about Gopi skirts and ladies clothing, a featured products/collection section, and a footer with business name and contact placeholder.

quotes: my bussiness name is divyavastra . my bussiness relate to a gopi skirts ladies clothes

acceptanceCriteria: Brand name 'DivyaVastra' is visible in the header/hero area
A tagline referencing Gopi skirts or ladies clothing is displayed
A featured collection or product grid section is present on the homepage

requirements.text: Design and apply a warm, festive, and elegant visual theme inspired by traditional Indian Gopi skirt aesthetics — using rich saffron, deep magenta, gold, and earthy tones with decorative typography and flowing layout motifs. Apply this theme consistently across all pages.

quotes: my bussiness relate to a gopi skirts ladies clothes

acceptanceCriteria: Color palette uses warm traditional tones (saffron, magenta, gold, earthy hues) — no blue or purple
Typography feels festive and elegant, fitting a traditional Indian clothing brand
Theme is applied consistently across all UI sections

requirements.text: Create a backend data model for clothing products with fields: id, name, description, price, category (defaulting to 'Gopi Skirt'), imageUrl, and availability. Seed the backend with at least 4 sample Gopi skirt products.

quotes: my bussiness relate to a gopi skirts ladies clothes

acceptanceCriteria: A Product type is defined in the Motoko actor with all specified fields
At least 4 sample Gopi skirt products are pre-seeded
A query function to list all products is exposed

requirements.text: Display the product catalog fetched from the backend on the homepage collection section, showing each product's name, price, description, and image.

quotes: my bussiness relate to a gopi skirts ladies clothes

acceptanceCriteria: Product list is fetched from the backend canister and rendered on the frontend
Each product card shows name, price, and description
Product images are displayed in the card

constraints: All Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor file
Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui

required: Hero banner with colorful flowing Gopi skirts fabric pattern in saffron, magenta, and gold tones with floral and paisley motifs (hero-banner.dim_1200x500.png)
DivyaVastra brand logo with decorative Indian-style lettering in gold on a deep red background (logo.dim_400x150.png)
Product placeholder image showing a vibrant Gopi skirt in rich colors (product-placeholder.dim_600x700.png)
